author: y4rr
content:
Landed a substantial subset; remaining ~40 fns split out to #607 (forwarders to existing modules + ops needing new GradFn primitives).

## What landed in \`ferrotorch-nn/src/functional.rs\`

### Activations (14 new)
\`hardtanh\` / \`hardtanh_with\`, \`relu6\`, \`hardsigmoid\`, \`hardswish\`, \`log_sigmoid\` (numerically stable via \`-softplus(-x)\`), \`softmin\`, \`softsign\`, \`tanhshrink\`, \`selu\` (canonical α/scale constants), \`softplus\` / \`softplus_with\` (re-export with default beta/threshold), \`elu\` / \`elu_with\` (re-export), \`mish\` (re-export), \`glu\` (split + sigmoid + multiply along arbitrary dim).

### Loss (4 new)
\`l1_loss\` (mean / sum / none reductions), \`binary_cross_entropy\`, \`binary_cross_entropy_with_logits\` (numerically stable: \`-y·z + softplus(z)\`), \`kl_div\` (with eps-shifted log to handle \`target = 0\`).

### Distance / normalization (3 new)
\`normalize(x, p, dim, eps)\` (L_p with eps-clamped denominator), \`cosine_similarity\` (along arbitrary dim), \`pairwise_distance\` (L_p along last dim).

### Utility (1 new, non-differentiable)
\`one_hot(indices, num_classes)\` — round-to-nearest with bounds checking; out-of-range / negative indices return \`InvalidArgument\`. Documented as not differentiable (matches torch — input is integer-valued).

## Pattern
Every new fn is implemented as a composition of existing differentiable primitives in \`ferrotorch_core::grad_fns\` (\`activation\`, \`arithmetic\`, \`transcendental\`, \`reduction\`). No new GradFn types required. Autograd works automatically via the underlying chain rule on each primitive.

## Tests
- \`ferrotorch-nn functional::tests\`: 62 pass (29 new + 33 existing)
- \`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions

## Out of scope → #607
- Conv* / pool* / pad* / norm* forwarders (all wrap existing modules — mechanical work)
- \`embedding\` / \`embedding_bag\` / \`scaled_dot_product_attention\` (wrap existing modules)
- \`softshrink\` / \`hardshrink\` / \`threshold\` / \`prelu\` (need new elementwise-mask GradFn)
- \`smooth_l1\` / \`huber_loss\` / \`nll_loss\` / \`gaussian_nll_loss\` / \`poisson_nll_loss\` (need where / gather)
- Specialty losses: \`ctc_loss\`, \`triplet_*\`, \`*_margin_loss\`, \`multilabel_*\`
- \`alpha_dropout\`, \`feature_alpha_dropout\`, \`dropout1d\`/\`2d\`/\`3d\`, \`gumbel_softmax\`
